---
title: "Get in touch"
---

## Contact

**Email**\
[connorconkeymorrison@gmail.com](mailto:connorconkeymorrison@gmail.com)

For research, teaching, clinical, or professional inquiries, email is the best point of contact. I aim to respond within a few business days.

---

## Current appointments

| Role | Organisation | Days |
|---|---|---|
| PhD Candidate | RMIT University | 24/7, 365 |
| Industry Partner (PhD) & School Counsellor | CatholicCare Victoria / Sacred Heart Primary School, Kew | Tuesdays/flexible |
| Sessional Academic | RMIT University | Fridays |
| Associate Lecturer | Cairnmillar Institute | Mondays |

---

## Curriculum Vitae

[Download CV (PDF)](Profile.pdf)
 Coming soon!
